case_title: ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC VS. ATAKELTI WUBNEH et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE OF S/C ON ATAKE TI WURNEH FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST MARK D. WALSH, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-26-2009, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-10-2009. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MARIA LERTORA CSR# 11935 (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE ON ATAKELTI WUBNEH FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-26-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WUBNEH, ATAKELTI DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-29-2009
